login.subtitle: Sign in to manage your server

Settings.title: Server Settings
Settings.description: Manage your Assetto Corsa server_cfg.ini file.
Settings.saveSuccess: Settings saved. Restart the server to apply.

general.title: Basic Information
general.description: How your server will appear in the lobby.

network.title: Network Configuration
network.description: If you change ports here, you will need to change docker-compose.yml.

rules.title: Driving Assists
rules.description: Define what is allowed on your server.
rules.tyreBranketsDesc: Tires start pre-warmed from the pits.

sessions.title: Session Durations
sessions.description: Adjust times for practice, qualifying, and race.

ConfigEditor.title: Configuration File Editor
ConfigEditor.description: Directly edit .ini and .yml files shared between the manager and the AC server.
ConfigEditor.hint: Changes take effect after restarting the AC server.

Users.title: User Management
Users.description: Add and manage users who can access AC Manager.
Users.newUserDescription: Create a new account to access the manager.
Users.name: Full Name

Errors.unauthorized: You need to log in to access this page.
Errors.forbidden: You do not have permission to access this resource.
Errors.serverError: An internal error occurred. Try again.

Content.title: Content Manager
Content.description: Install new mods (Cars or Tracks) or view existing content.
Content.installUrlDetail: Paste the direct link (.zip) for the server to download.
Content.installUrlHint: Only direct download links. Sites like Mediafire may fail.
Content.extracting: Extracting, analyzing files, and syncing. This may take a few minutes...
Content.connError: Failed to connect to the server.

EntryList.title: Grid Setup
EntryList.description: Choose the location and machines for the next session.
EntryList.selectCarError: Please select at least one car!
EntryList.selectSkinError: Please select at least 1 skin for each car!
EntryList.maxClientsError: The track supports a maximum of {max} slots.
EntryList.saveSuccess: Grid updated! Pitboxes were successfully generated and distributed.
EntryList.gridSizeDesc: How many drivers can join the server.
EntryList.gridSizeLimitError: Value exceeds the limit of the selected track!
EntryList.carRosterDesc: Select allowed vehicles. Slots will be distributed equally among selected cars.
EntryList.noCars: No cars registered. Install mods first!
EntryList.noSelectedCars: Click + on cars above to add them to the grid.
